variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the FDA have authorized a medical device that incorporates LLM-based functionality by 31 March 2026?

variables.name: final_guidance_pccp_issued
variables.description: Whether the FDA has published a final guidance document specifically on Predetermined Change Control Plans (PCCPs) for AI/ML-enabled software, which is a key regulatory pathway for generative models.

variables.name: total_ai_ml_authorized_devices
variables.description: The total number of AI/ML-enabled medical devices authorized by the FDA as listed in its official database (in hundreds).

variables.name: public_llm_pccp_submission
variables.description: At least one medical device manufacturer publicly announces they have submitted a 510(k), De Novo, or PMA application for a device explicitly using a foundation model or LLM.

variables.name: fda_digital_health_advisory_meetings
variables.description: The number of formal meetings or workshops held by the FDA's Digital Health Advisory Committee specifically addressing generative AI or foundation models in clinical settings.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Russia capture Kostyantynivka by March 31?

variables.name: capture_of_chasiv_yar
variables.description: Whether Russian forces have established full control over the city of Chasiv Yar, a critical high-ground defensive position preceding Kostyantynivka.

variables.name: distance_from_frontline
variables.description: The shortest distance from the Russian-controlled territory (shaded red on ISW/DeepState) to the Kostyantynivka railroad station as of the forecast date.

variables.name: artillery_fire_control_established
variables.description: Whether Russian forces have established consistent physical or fire control over the T0504 highway leading into Kostyantynivka from the east.

variables.name: monthly_russian_advance_rate
variables.description: The average linear progress of the Russian frontline towards the Kostyantynivka city limits over the preceding two months.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Pamandzi will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: historical_avg_temp_diff
variables.description: The historical average difference in daily mean temperature between Feb 8 and Feb 1 at Pamandzi over the last 20 years.

variables.name: pamandzi_temp_feb_01
variables.description: The recorded daily average temperature at the Pamandzi station on 2026-02-01.

variables.name: cyclone_activity_sw_indian_ocean
variables.description: The presence of an active tropical cyclone or depression in the Southwest Indian Ocean (near Mayotte) on or between Feb 1 and Feb 8, 2026, which can significantly depress or raise temperatures via cloud cover or wind.

variables.name: regional_sst_anomaly
variables.description: The Sea Surface Temperature (SST) anomaly in the Mozambique Channel during February 2026 compared to the long-term average.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will a new multilateral security agreement involving at least three Middle East and North Africa (MENA) states (excluding Iran, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Israel) be publicly announced by 30 June 2026?

variables.name: high_level_security_summits
variables.description: Number of multilateral security or defense summits involving at least three eligible MENA states (excluding Iran, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Israel) held between Feb 2026 and June 2026.

variables.name: red_sea_maritime_incidents
variables.description: Monthly average of reported attacks or security incidents involving commercial or naval vessels in the Red Sea/Gulf of Aden during the first half of 2026, serving as a catalyst for maritime security cooperation.

variables.name: draft_agreement_leaks
variables.description: Public reports or leaks from credible news agencies (e.g., Reuters, AP) indicating that a specific defense pact or joint military task force is being drafted by three or more eligible MENA states.

variables.name: regional_defense_expo_announcements
variables.description: Whether a major regional defense exhibition (such as UMEX or similar) results in the signing of a memorandum of understanding (MoU) for joint military production or intelligence sharing between three or more eligible MENA states.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Battles' in Saudi Arabia for the 30 days before 2026-02-08 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-01?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Battles'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Battles' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_360_day_battles
variables.description: Total number of 'Battles' recorded in Saudi Arabia by ACLED in the 360 days preceding 2026-02-01.

variables.name: yemen_conflict_escalation_status
variables.description: Whether a major military offensive or significant escalation (e.g., cross-border ground incursions) involving Saudi and Houthi forces is active in early 2026.

variables.name: internal_insurgency_events
variables.description: Number of 'Battles' involving domestic insurgent groups or internal security clashes within Saudi borders during the 30-day target period.

variables.name: border_clash_frequency
variables.description: The frequency of reported violent interactions between organized armed groups along the Saudi-Yemeni border in the 30 days before 2026-02-08.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will anyone other than Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner win a major in 2026 (men's tennis)?

variables.name: australian_open_2026_winner_other
variables.description: True if the winner of the 2026 Australian Open is anyone other than Carlos Alcaraz or Jannik Sinner.

variables.name: novak_djokovic_major_finals_2026
variables.description: The number of Grand Slam finals Novak Djokovic reaches in the 2026 calendar year.

variables.name: top_ten_non_big_two_titles
variables.description: Total number of ATP Masters 1000 and Grand Slam titles won by the rest of the ATP Top 10 (excluding Alcaraz and Sinner) in the 12 months preceding the 2026 US Open.

variables.name: alcaraz_sinner_injury_withdrawal_count
variables.description: The total number of Grand Slam tournaments in 2026 where either Carlos Alcaraz or Jannik Sinner withdraws or retires due to injury.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will  an attempt be made to fire Jerome Powell before the end of his term?

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_changes
variables.description: The net change in the federal funds target rate (in percentage points) between February 1, 2026, and May 15, 2026. Lowering rates may decrease the likelihood of a firing attempt.

variables.name: formal_white_house_legal_opinion
variables.description: Whether the White House Office of Legal Counsel or the Department of Justice issues a formal written opinion or public statement asserting the President's legal authority to remove a member of the Federal Reserve Board 'at will' before May 15, 2026.

variables.name: trump_public_criticism_count
variables.description: The number of days between February 1, 2026, and May 15, 2026, on which President Trump publicly criticizes Jerome Powell or the Federal Reserve via social media or official press statements.

variables.name: supreme_court_injunction_status
variables.description: Whether a federal court or the Supreme Court issues a stay or injunction related to the removal of other independent agency heads (like the FTC or NCUA) that specifically challenges the 'for cause' removal protection precedent prior to Powell's term end.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Lumina oral probiotic treatment reduce the rate of cavities by at least 50% in the 4 years after application?

variables.name: successful_long_term_colonization
variables.description: The percentage of trial participants who maintain high levels of the BCS3-L1 strain in their oral microbiome 4 years after the initial application.

variables.name: publication_of_randomized_controlled_trial
variables.description: Whether a peer-reviewed, randomized controlled trial (RCT) specifically measuring cavity rates in Lumina users compared to a control group is published by the resolution date.

variables.name: mean_cavity_reduction_percentage
variables.description: The observed mean percentage reduction in the incidence of new dental caries in the treatment group compared to the control group in available study data.

variables.name: safety_and_regulatory_clearance
variables.description: Whether the treatment remains available for public purchase or clinical use without being halted by regulatory bodies (like the FDA) due to safety concerns or lack of efficacy evidence.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Chicago Board Options Exchange's Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: wti_crude_price_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the WTI crude oil spot price between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08. Large price movements typically drive higher volatility.

variables.name: geopolitical_risk_event
variables.description: Occurrence of a major geopolitical event or supply disruption in a key oil-producing region during the measurement week.

variables.name: ovx_initial_level
variables.description: The value of the CBOE Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index on 2026-02-01. Lower starting values are statistically more likely to increase due to mean reversion.

variables.name: opec_plus_policy_shift
variables.description: Whether an official OPEC+ meeting or significant unscheduled policy announcement occurs between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the price of Brent crude oil have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: opec_plus_production_change
variables.description: The net change in planned oil production quotas or voluntary cuts announced by OPEC+ members in the week leading up to Feb 8, 2026.

variables.name: geopolitical_conflict_escalation
variables.description: Occurrence of a significant new military escalation or infrastructure attack in a major oil-producing region (e.g., Middle East) during the week of Feb 1-8.

variables.name: us_crude_inventory_change
variables.description: The weekly change in U.S. commercial crude oil inventories as reported by the EIA during the forecast week.

variables.name: usd_index_movement
variables.description: The percentage change in the U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) between Feb 1 and Feb 8, 2026, as oil is priced in USD.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will XOM's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: brent_crude_weekly_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the price of Brent Crude oil between the market close on 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_performance
variables.description: The percentage change of the S&P 500 index from the market close on 2026-02-01 to 2026-02-08, reflecting broad market sentiment.

variables.name: q4_earnings_surprise
variables.description: The difference between Exxon Mobil's reported earnings per share (EPS) and the consensus analyst estimate for the quarter ending Dec 2025 (typically reported in early Feb).

variables.name: major_geopolitical_disruption
variables.description: Occurrence of a significant geopolitical event (e.g., new conflict in major oil-producing regions or major infrastructure sabotage) between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08 that impacts global oil supply expectations.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: clermont_avg_temp_feb_01
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport on 2026-02-01.

variables.name: clermont_avg_temp_feb_08
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport on 2026-02-08.

variables.name: clermont_climatological_temp_trend
variables.description: The historical average difference in daily mean temperature between Feb 8th and Feb 1st at this station (Feb 8 - Feb 1).

variables.name: presence_of_blocking_anticyclone
variables.description: Whether a high-pressure blocking system (e.g., Omega block) is present over Western Europe during the first week of February 2026, which typically stabilizes temperatures.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will R Praggnanandhaa have an Elo rating on 2026-02-08 that's at least 1% higher than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: praggnanandhaa_elo_feb_2026
variables.description: The official FIDE Elo rating of R Praggnanandhaa as listed on Wikipedia for the February 2026 rating period.

variables.name: wikipedia_fide_update_lag
variables.description: Whether the Wikipedia 'FIDE rankings' page has been updated with the February 2026 FIDE list by February 8, 2026.

variables.name: tata_steel_performance_rating
variables.description: Tournament performance rating of Praggnanandhaa in the January 2026 Tata Steel Chess Tournament, which usually concludes just before February 1st.

variables.name: elo_percentage_change_required
variables.description: The numerical increase in Elo points required to meet the 1% growth threshold based on a baseline of approximately 2750-2800.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will CRL's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08, reflecting general market sentiment.

variables.name: crl_q4_earnings_surprise
variables.description: The difference between reported earnings per share and analyst consensus for CRL's Q4 2025 results, typically released in early February.

variables.name: biotech_sector_performance
variables.description: The weekly percentage change of the iShares Biotechnology ETF (IBB) between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08.

variables.name: guidance_revision_positive
variables.description: Whether CRL issues a positive revision to its full-year 2026 revenue or earnings guidance during its February earnings call.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Barack Obama be arrested before July 2026?

variables.name: doj_formal_indictment_obama
variables.description: Whether the U.S. Department of Justice issues a formal indictment against Barack Obama for treason or related charges before July 2026.

variables.name: special_counsel_appointment_obama
variables.description: Whether a Special Counsel is officially appointed by the Attorney General specifically to investigate Barack Obama's role in the 2016 or 2020 election matters.

variables.name: trump_approval_rating
variables.description: The FiveThirtyEight (or equivalent aggregator) average presidential approval rating for Donald Trump as of May 1, 2026, reflecting political capital for high-risk actions.

variables.name: federal_indictments_political_opponents
variables.description: The number of high-ranking former Obama or Biden administration officials (Cabinet level or agency heads) indicted by the DOJ between January 2025 and June 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Elon Musk be worth more than $1 Trillion by Jan 1st, 2029?

variables.name: tesla_stock_price_2028
variables.description: The closing price of Tesla (TSLA) stock on the last trading day of 2028, adjusted for any splits occurring after February 2026.

variables.name: spacex_valuation_2028
variables.description: The estimated post-money valuation of SpaceX based on its most recent private funding round or secondary market transaction by late 2028.

variables.name: musk_tesla_equity_retention
variables.description: The percentage of Tesla's total outstanding shares owned by Elon Musk, including vested stock options from his compensation packages.

variables.name: xai_valuation_exceeds_100bn
variables.description: Whether xAI (Elon Musk's AI company) reaches a private or public valuation of at least $100 billion before January 1st, 2029.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Wagner Moura win the Academy Award for Best Actor at the 2026 Academy Awards?

variables.name: sag_award_best_actor_win
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the Screen Actors Guild (SAG) Award for Outstanding Performance by a Male Actor in a Leading Role in 2026. The SAG Award is the strongest precursor for the Best Actor Oscar.

variables.name: bafta_best_actor_win
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the BAFTA Award for Best Actor in a Leading Role in 2026. This indicates momentum from the British Academy, which shares significant membership overlap with the Academy.

variables.name: gold_derby_odds_rank
variables.description: Moura's rank among the five nominees on the Gold Derby prediction aggregate on the morning of the 98th Academy Awards ceremony. A rank of 1 indicates he is the betting favorite.

variables.name: the_secret_agent_nomination_count
variables.description: The total number of Academy Award nominations received by the film 'The Secret Agent'. A higher count usually suggests broad support for the film across the Academy's branches, increasing the lead actor's win probability.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Israel win Eurovision 2026?

variables.name: israel_participation_confirmed
variables.description: Whether Israel is officially included in the final list of participating countries for Eurovision 2026 by the EBU.

variables.name: betting_odds_rank
variables.description: Israel's position in the aggregate betting odds for Eurovision 2026 as of one week before the final.

variables.name: televote_score_israel
variables.description: The total points awarded to Israel by the public televote in the Grand Final of Eurovision 2026, scaled by 100.

variables.name: israel_qualifies_for_final
variables.description: Whether the Israeli entry successfully qualifies from the semi-final stage to the Grand Final.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Alibaba have the best AI model at the end of February 2026?

variables.name: qwen_highest_arena_rank
variables.description: The highest rank achieved by any Alibaba Qwen model on the LMSYS Chatbot Arena leaderboard at any point between February 15 and February 27, 2026.

variables.name: competitor_frontier_release_count
variables.description: The total number of major frontier model updates released by OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google between February 15 and February 28, 2026, that could displace the top rank.

variables.name: qwen_arena_score_gap
variables.description: The difference in Arena Score points between the top Alibaba model and the current #1 ranked model on the leaderboard as of February 15, 2026.

variables.name: qwen_new_major_version_launch
variables.description: Whether Alibaba officially releases a new major generation of its foundation model (e.g., Qwen-3 or equivalent) between February 15 and February 25, 2026, allowing time for arena testing.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) take control of Bamako, Mali by 1 June 2026?

variables.name: bamako_fuel_index
variables.description: Average monthly retail price of gasoline in Bamako relative to the January 2025 price; an index of 5.0 indicates a five-fold increase, signaling a successful blockade.

variables.name: russian_troop_withdrawal
variables.description: A significant and publicly reported reduction (more than 50%) of Russian Africa Corps (formerly Wagner) personnel or assets from the Bamako area before June 2026.

variables.name: jnim_control_regional_capitals
variables.description: The number of Malian regional capitals (e.g., Segou, Mopti, Kayes) outside of Bamako that are under effective JNIM control by May 2026.

variables.name: fama_internal_defection
variables.description: Reports of a major mutiny or large-scale defection (over 500 soldiers) within the Malian Armed Forces (FAMa) defending the capital region.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the United Nations Security Council adopt a resolution related to the conflict in Sudan by 1 May 2026?

variables.name: unsc_sudan_draft_vetos
variables.description: The number of draft resolutions concerning the Sudan conflict that are vetoed by a permanent member of the Security Council between 15 February 2026 and 1 May 2026.

variables.name: unitams_successor_mandate_vote
variables.description: Whether a resolution is formally proposed to establish a new UN monitoring or peace-support mission in Sudan to replace or succeed the functions of the closed UNITAMS mission before 1 May 2026.

variables.name: sudan_ipc_famine_classification
variables.description: The number of regions in Sudan classified as IPC Phase 5 (Famine) in official Integrated Food Security Phase Classification reports released between 15 February 2026 and 1 May 2026.

variables.name: unsc_sudan_sanctions_renewal_urgency
variables.description: Whether the UN Security Council holds an emergency session or formal meeting specifically to discuss the modification of the 1591 Sanctions Committee mandate before 1 May 2026 (distinct from the scheduled October renewal).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Brest Bretagne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-22 than on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: brest_avg_temp_feb_15
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Brest Bretagne Airport on February 15, 2026.

variables.name: north_atlantic_oscillation_index
variables.description: The daily value of the NAO index on February 22, 2026, which significantly influences winter weather patterns in Western France.

variables.name: zonal_wind_anomaly_850hpa
variables.description: The departure from climatology of the 850hPa zonal wind speed over the Western English Channel on February 22, 2026; positive values indicate stronger maritime influence.

variables.name: maritime_arctic_airmass_intrusion
variables.description: Whether a significant maritime arctic or polar continental airmass is present over Northwest France on February 22, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Protests' in Azerbaijan for the 30 days before 2026-02-22 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Protests'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Protests' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_protest_baseline
variables.description: The average number of ACLED 'Protests' in Azerbaijan per 30-day period over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15.

variables.name: parliamentary_election_unrest
variables.description: Whether a national parliamentary or presidential election is scheduled or held in Azerbaijan between 2026-01-01 and 2026-02-22, which historically triggers protests.

variables.name: economic_misery_index_delta
variables.description: The year-over-year percentage change in Azerbaijan's inflation rate plus unemployment rate as of early 2026; high values correlate with civil unrest.

variables.name: state_security_crackdown_intensity
variables.description: A measure of the Azerbaijani government's proactive suppression of assembly (0 = low/normal, 10 = extreme/martial law) during the target window.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the market yield on US treasury securities at 3-month constant maturity, quoted on an investment basis, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_change
variables.description: The change in the effective federal funds rate between February 15 and February 22, 2026, which heavily influences short-term treasury yields.

variables.name: cpi_surprise_index
variables.description: The difference between actual and expected Consumer Price Index (CPI) readings released in the week leading up to February 22, 2026, affecting inflation expectations.

variables.name: fomc_hawkish_shift
variables.description: Whether any FOMC meeting minutes or scheduled speeches released between Feb 15 and Feb 22 signal a more hawkish (higher rates) stance than previously priced into the market.

variables.name: treasury_bill_auction_demand
variables.description: The bid-to-cover ratio for the 13-week T-bill auction occurring during the week of February 15, reflecting investor demand for short-term debt.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the euro short-term rate (volume-weighted trimmed mean), a measure of the borrowing costs of banks in the euro area, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: ecb_deposit_facility_rate_change
variables.description: The change in the ECB Deposit Facility Rate announced between 2026-02-15 and 2026-02-22, which typically acts as a floor for the €STR.

variables.name: estr_volatility_index
variables.description: The standard deviation of the daily €STR values over the 7 days leading up to 2026-02-15, indicating market stability.

variables.name: excess_liquidity_change
variables.description: The change in total excess liquidity in the Eurosystem (current account holdings plus deposit facility minus reserve requirements) between the start and end of the forecast period.

variables.name: maintenance_period_end_proximity
variables.description: Whether the settlement date 2026-02-22 falls within the final three days of an ECB reserve maintenance period, which often triggers spikes in overnight rates.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will a vaccine have been developed for Heartland virus disease by 2026-02-22?

variables.name: clinical_trial_phase_status
variables.description: The highest clinical trial phase (1, 2, or 3) successfully completed for any Heartland virus vaccine candidate as of February 2026.

variables.name: fda_approval_heartland_vaccine
variables.description: Whether any vaccine for Heartland virus has received regulatory approval or emergency use authorization from the FDA by the target date.

variables.name: total_confirmed_cases_count
variables.description: The total number of laboratory-confirmed Heartland virus disease cases reported in the United States, indicating the disease burden and urgency for vaccine development.

variables.name: wikipedia_vaccine_mention
variables.description: Whether the 'Vaccination' or 'Prevention' section of the 'Heartland virus' or 'List of infectious diseases' Wikipedia pages mentions an available vaccine.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will Evgeniia Chikunova still hold the world record for 200m breaststroke in long course (50 metres) swimming pools on 2026-02-22?

variables.name: competitors_sub_2_18_swims
variables.description: Total number of times a swimmer other than Chikunova performs a sub-2:18.00 swim in a long course pool before the target date.

variables.name: major_championships_held
variables.description: Number of major long-course championships (e.g., World Aquatics Championships, major continental championships) held between 2026-02-15 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: chikunova_ratification_status
variables.description: Whether Chikunova's current record (2:17.55) remains ratified and listed without a pending challenge or removal on Wikipedia.

variables.name: fastest_non_chikunova_time
variables.description: The fastest time recorded in the 200m breaststroke (LC) by any swimmer other than Chikunova between 2024-01-01 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will LVS's market close price on 2026-02-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: lvs_weekly_price_change_pct
variables.description: The percentage change in LVS market close price from February 15, 2026, to February 22, 2026.

variables.name: macao_gaming_revenue_trend
variables.description: The year-over-year percentage growth in Macao Gross Gaming Revenue (GGR) reported for the most recent month prior to the forecast window.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage return of the S&P 500 index during the same one-week period (Feb 15 to Feb 22, 2026), indicating broader market sentiment.

variables.name: lvs_earnings_surprise_binary
variables.description: Whether LVS reported a positive earnings surprise (actual EPS > consensus EPS) in its most recent quarterly earnings report prior to February 15, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: If Viktor Orbán leads a party in the 2026 Hungarian Election, will he become Prime Minister?

variables.name: fidesz_tisza_polling_margin
variables.description: The average polling margin of the Fidesz-KDNP alliance relative to the Tisza Party in major independent opinion polls one month prior to the election (positive if Fidesz leads, negative if Tisza leads).

variables.name: fidesz_seat_share_2026
variables.description: The percentage of seats won by the Fidesz-KDNP alliance in the National Assembly following the 2026 general election.

variables.name: opposition_coalition_formation
variables.description: Whether the major opposition parties (Tisza and others) formally agree to support a single candidate for Prime Minister other than Viktor Orbán prior to or immediately following the vote.

variables.name: hungary_gdp_growth_2025
variables.description: The annual real GDP growth rate of Hungary for the full year 2025, reflecting the economic sentiment leading into the election year.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Scottish Labour Party be the second largest party in Holyrood after the next election?

variables.name: labour_polling_avg_scotland
variables.description: The average percentage of the vote for Scottish Labour in Holyrood constituency polling three months prior to the election.

variables.name: conservative_seat_total
variables.description: Total number of seats won by the Scottish Conservative and Unionist Party in the next Holyrood election.

variables.name: snp_majority_loss
variables.description: Whether the SNP wins fewer than 60 seats in the next Holyrood election, potentially opening a gap for Labour to move into second or first place.

variables.name: labour_seat_lead_over_tories
variables.description: The margin by which Scottish Labour seats exceed Scottish Conservative seats (negative if Conservatives have more).

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will BLK's market close price on 2026-03-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index between the close on 2026-03-01 and 2026-03-08. BlackRock's stock is highly correlated with broader market performance.

variables.name: blk_trailing_volatility
variables.description: The 30-day realized volatility of BLK shares leading up to March 2026. Higher volatility increases the probability of significant price swings in a one-week window.

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_change_bias
variables.description: Indicates if there is a Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting or major interest rate guidance expected during this specific week. BlackRock's AUM and margins are sensitive to interest rate outlooks.

variables.name: financial_sector_relative_strength
variables.description: The ratio of the XLF (Financial Select Sector SPDR Fund) performance relative to the S&P 500 during the week of 2026-03-01 to 2026-03-08.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) take control of Bamako, Mali by 1 June 2026?

variables.name: bamako_encirclement_status
variables.description: Whether JNIM has successfully cut off all three major supply routes into Bamako (from Senegal, Côte d'Ivoire, and Guinea) for a continuous period of at least 30 days prior to 1 June 2026.

variables.name: russia_africa_corps_strength
variables.description: The estimated number of Russian Africa Corps (formerly Wagner) personnel active in the Bamako region to support Malian security forces.

variables.name: malian_government_relocation
variables.description: Whether the Malian military leadership or cabinet officially relocates the seat of government from Bamako to another city (e.g., Gao or Mopti) due to security threats.

variables.name: fuel_and_staple_price_index
variables.description: The percentage increase in the average price of fuel and basic food staples in Bamako compared to March 2024 levels, reflecting the severity of the economic blockade.
